projects.name: SmartPOS Web Application
projects.description: Designed and implemented a smart POS system featuring real-time billing, inventory, and product management modules. Improved transaction efficiency and inventory tracking for small retail businesses through an intuitive, web-based interface.

projects.name: Stock Price Prediction App
projects.description: Developed a stock price prediction app integrating machine learning models to forecast market trends with real-time data visualization. Enhanced decision-making for retail investors by providing predictive insights and interactive data dashboards.
